rounds: Two weeks of showing up, going through the motions, wearing the kit — that's not nothing, that counts. But the Apollo ring moment? Colleague asks, you had an opening, and you closed it. The ring was right there on your finger doing the work and you left it hanging.
pattern: They're fine with the accessories, they just won't let anyone see them.
focus: One sentence. Next time someone notices something — the ring, the nails, anything — you say one true thing about it instead of shutting it down.
